reviews.review_description: This is great except for one major flaw, you can't set the width of the head. My vacuums head is a good 1.5 times wider than the default width, so this is pretty much useless for me and anyone with a bigger vacuum.

Only 2 issues; brush head width isn’t accurate, mounting controller to vacuum is an issue. The mapping however works fairly well. I’m sure a 3D printed controller mount would fix one of the issues. Devs need to look into the width issue though.

reviews.review_title: Only shows path in tiny window
reviews.review_description: I would actually give this five stars if I wasn’t looking through a 5 inch window of my progress with metrics on it.
